## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` adds no new warnings
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes (GPU / on-device tests are run manually where relevant)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits and contain **no** `Co-Authored-By` trailers
- [ ] Changes are surgical — unrelated code is not reformatted
